message:
fix(demo_showcase): Address clippy warnings for hit testing

- Change hit_to_action from method to associated function (unused_self)
- Replace wildcard import with explicit imports (wildcard_imports)
- Add cast_possible_truncation to register_hit_areas allow list

Refs: bd-35rk
